---
title: "ratingcurve handle"
format: html
editor: visual
---


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(here)
library(zoo)
library(lubridate)

# ── BLOCK 3: Build sediment_clean.csv ────────────────────────

sed_raw <- read_excel(
  here("ref", "豐坪溪河川輸砂量統計.xlsx"),
  sheet = "工作表3"
)

sed_clean <- sed_raw |>
  mutate(
    date_full    = as.Date(sprintf("%04d-%02d-%02d",
                   as.integer(year),
                   as.integer(month),
                   as.integer(date))),
    SSL_expected = Discharge_CMS * Sed_Con_ppm * 0.0864,
    flag = case_when(
      Discharge_CMS > 500 &
        month %in% c(1,2,3,4,5,11,12)  ~ "Q_typo",
      Discharge_CMS > 800              ~ "Q_extreme_check",
      Sed_Con_ppm == 0                 ~ "below_detection",
      Sed_Con_ppm > 0 &
        abs(Sus_Load_MTDay - SSL_expected) /
        (SSL_expected + 0.001) > 0.15  ~ "ssl_inconsistent",
      TRUE                             ~ "ok"
    )
  ) |>
  mutate(
    Discharge_CMS = if_else(flag == "Q_typo",
                             Discharge_CMS / 100,
                             Discharge_CMS),
    flag = if_else(flag == "Q_typo", "typo_corrected", flag)
  )

cat("=== sediment_clean flag distribution ===\n")
sed_clean |> count(flag) |>
  mutate(pct = round(n/nrow(sed_clean)*100, 1)) |>
  print()

write_csv(sed_clean, here("data", "sediment_clean.csv"))
cat("Saved: sediment_clean.csv\n\n")

# ── BLOCK 4: Build rating_curve_params.csv ───────────────────

fit_data <- sed_clean |>
  filter(flag == "ok",
         Discharge_CMS > 0,
         Sus_Load_MTDay > 0) |>
  mutate(log_Q   = log(Discharge_CMS),
         log_SSL = log(Sus_Load_MTDay))

model <- lm(log_SSL ~ log_Q, data = fit_data)
a     <- exp(coef(model)[[1]])
b     <- coef(model)[[2]]
r2    <- summary(model)$r.squared

cat("=== Rating curve ===\n")
cat("a  :", round(a, 4), "\n")
cat("b  :", round(b, 4), "\n")
cat("R² :", round(r2, 3), "\n")
cat("n  :", nrow(fit_data), "\n\n")

rating_params <- tibble(
  parameter   = c("a", "b", "r_squared", "n_points",
                  "Q_min_cms", "Q_max_cms",
                  "year_min", "year_max"),
  value       = c(a, b, r2, nrow(fit_data),
                  min(fit_data$Discharge_CMS),
                  max(fit_data$Discharge_CMS),
                  min(sed_clean$year, na.rm = TRUE),
                  max(sed_clean$year, na.rm = TRUE)),
  description = c(
    "Rating curve coefficient (SSL = a * Q^b)",
    "Rating curve exponent",
    "R-squared of log-log regression",
    "Number of valid observations used",
    "Minimum Q in fitting data (cms)",
    "Maximum Q in fitting data (cms)",
    "First year of sediment record",
    "Last year of sediment record"
  )
)

write_csv(rating_params, here("data", "rating_curve_params.csv"))
cat("Saved: rating_curve_params.csv\n\n")

# ── Final inventory ──────────────────────────────────────────
cat("=== data/ inventory ===\n")
fs::dir_ls(here("data")) |> basename() |>
  purrr::walk(~cat(" ", .x, "\n"))
```
